## [Harshita Arora Joins YC as General Partner](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/welcome-harshita)
We're thrilled to announce that Harshita Arora is joining Y Combinator as a General Partner. She brings deep fintech and infrastructure experience, a founder's instinct for product, and the perspective of someone who's been building companies since she was a teenager.

[Read More](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/welcome-harshita)

[![Image 3](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/content/images/2026/04/2025-YC-Intern-Happy-Hour-0708_013.jpg)](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/welcome-harshita)

### All Posts

[2026 Demo Day Dates](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/2026-demo-days)
by [Y Combinator](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/author/yc)12/18/2025

We’re excited to share the Demo Day dates for 2026 so founders, investors, and our broader community can plan ahead.

[Read More](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/2026-demo-days)

[Meesho Goes Public](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/meesho-goes-public)
by [Tim Brady](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/author/tim-brady)12/10/2025

Meesho goes public today. From S16 to IPO, they’ve built one of India’s largest e-commerce platforms—empowering millions of small merchants to grow their businesses. Congrats to Vidit and Sanjeev on a decade of relentless building and listening to users!

[Read More](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/meesho-goes-public)

[Congratulations to Groww](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/groww)
by [Jon Levy](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/author/jon-levy)11/12/2025

Today, Groww, India's leading digital investing platform, goes public. Tens of millions use Groww to invest simply and confidently in stocks, mutual funds, and ETFs. As YC's first company to list in India, we couldn't be more proud.

[Read More](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/groww)

[BillionToOne Goes Public — The Startup That Made Genetic Testing Universal](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/billiontoone)
by [Jared Friedman](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/author/jared-friedman)11/6/2025

Today, BillionToOne goes public, becoming YC's fourth publicly traded biotech company. More importantly, they have built one of the most important genetic tests in the U.S. Today, 1 in 11 babies born in the US are tested with BillionToOne's fetal genetic test.

[Read More](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/billiontoone)

[Meet YC's Newest Visiting Partners](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/ycs-newest-visiting-partners)
by [Harj Taggar](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/author/harj-taggar)10/14/2025

We're excited to announce that nine exceptional founders are joining us as Visiting Partners at YC: Matt Riley, Harshita Arora, Grey Baker, Christopher Golda, Raphael Schaad, Christina Gilbert, Francois Chaubard, Vivian Shen, and James Evans.

[Read More](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/ycs-newest-visiting-partners)

[YC x Coinbase RFS: Build Onchain](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/build-onchain)
by [Harj Taggar](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/author/harj-taggar), [Jesse Pollak](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/author/jesse-pollak)9/23/2025

We are entering the era of Fintech 3.0. Regulatory clarity, growing consumer adoption, and low-cost chains have paved the way for a golden age of building in crypto — and at YC, Base, and Coinbase, we want to fund builders to seize this moment.

[Read More](https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/build-onchain)
